---
title: "CV"
---

## CV

A downloadable CV is not currently available in this repository.

<!-- TODO: Add a verified CV PDF under files/ and restore the download link when available. -->

## Selected Skills

- R, Python, Bash
- GATK, bcftools, samtools
- WGS/WES analysis
- Variant calling and annotation
- HPC / Slurm
- Mitochondrial genomics
